name: selvedge
description: Change tracking for AI-era codebases. Captures why AI agents made each change — entity, diff, and reasoning — to a local SQLite database before the session ends.

tools.name: log_change
tools.description: Record a change to a codebase entity. Call immediately after adding, modifying, or removing any DB column, table, function, API endpoint, dependency, or env variable. Set reasoning to the user's original request.

tools.name: diff
tools.description: Get change history for an entity or entity prefix. 'users' returns history for the users table and all its columns.

tools.name: blame
tools.description: Get the most recent change to an entity — what changed, when, which agent made the change, and why. Like git blame but for semantic entities.

tools.name: history
tools.description: Filtered history across all entities. Supports since (7d, 30d, 1y), entity_path prefix, and project filters.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Full-text search across entity paths, diffs, reasoning, and agents.
